description: Geofence-aware spatial contract for boundary membership checks, enter/exit event detection, and compliance-oriented context enrichment.

contains.description: Evaluate whether one or more locations fall within declared geofence boundaries.

enter_exit.description: Detect enter, exit, and dwell transitions for tracked assets crossing geofence boundaries.

enrich.description: Attach geofence, service-area, or compliance-boundary context to an upstream artifact.

examples: Check whether service vehicles are inside restricted zones
Detect facility enter and exit events for monitored assets
Enrich incident context with boundary and service-area compliance data
